programme.title: Bloomberg Technology
programme.desc: Technology is not only becoming an increasingly important part of people's lives but also of the American economy. "Bloomberg Technology" takes a look at how the latest happenings in the tech industry are affecting the U.S. markets. Analysis, commentary, interviews and interactive graphics are among the staples of the show that help viewers understand the impact the technology sector has on the economy. The show, which was originally titled "Bloomberg West," is anchored by Emily Chang in San Francisco.

programme.title: Bloomberg Real Yield
programme.desc: Not everyone has a lot of money to invest, which is why Bloomberg has financial indices that are based on fixed income, which is also the focus on this weekly show. The program covers news and trends in the fixed-income market and includes interviews with guests from major financial institutions. "Bloomberg Real Yield" incorporates data and analysis from terminal bond experts to help dive into topics that are moving the bond markets in order to help empower viewers to make knowledgeable financial decisions.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets
programme.desc: The most important global business and breaking markets news and information as it happens.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Focusing on the intersection of politics and global business.

programme.title: Bloomberg Businessweek

programme.title: Good Afternoon Britain
programme.desc: Tackling the big stories from all angles and perspectives. Weekdays from midday, Tom Harwood and Emily Carver bring you the most compelling stories from across the United Kingdom.

programme.title: Martin Daubney
programme.desc: Join Martin for an up-to-the-minute take on the day's events delivered in his own unique and lively style.

programme.title: Dewbs & Co
programme.desc: Plain-speaking, straight-talking - Michelle delivers her individual take on the day's news.

programme.title: Lee Anderson's Real World
programme.desc: Lee Anderson brings the Real World to the Great British public, as the silent majority finally have their voices heard.

programme.title: Untold Chaos: Living through Libya's wars
programme.desc: At the end of his US presidency, Barack Obama said his worst mistake was failing to plan for the day after the intervention in Libya. What followed was chaos. Filmed over seven years, this is an observational mosaic, capturing the feeling of a country in the hands of warlords and a proxy war, while a divided political process and a fragile international peace deal loom.

programme.title: Anonymous Comes to Town
programme.desc: The sleepy rustbelt town of Steubenville, Ohio, was once best known for high school sports and as the birthplace of Dean Martin. But when a teen sexual assault committed by two members of the football team surfaced, the shadowy hacker group Anonymous caught wind of the story and decided to intervene. After publishing videos and social media from the night of the assault to their millions of online followers, they sparked viral outrage and demands for #JusticeforJaneDoe.

programme.title: Cinema of Ukraine: artists reflect on modern history, culture and people
programme.desc: Presented in collaboration with the Kyiv-based Docudays UA film festival, these award-winning movies offer insight into the modern history of the country, its culture and its people. In This Rain Will Never Stop, directed by Alina Gorlova, we meet 20-year-old Andriy Suleyman, who escaped Syria with his family and found refuge in Ukraine, his mother's homeland. Shot in striking black and white, the film is a sophisticated vision of war zones and the scars they leave.

programme.title: Pitching up
programme.desc: How Ireland's ancient sports are helping to integrate children in the country's most ethnically diverse town.

programme.title: Fighting Shame
programme.desc: A group of women use everyday items to tell of the sacrifices and difficult choices they face, and the community initiatives they have launched in an attempt to tackle the shame surrounding poverty and make policymakers listen.

programme.title: Garth Nix answers your questions: on JRR Tolkien, gaming and pronouncing characters' names
programme.desc: In an ongoing series, Guardian Australia is getting kids and young adults to do the hard work instead of us – by interviewing their favourite authors. Here, the author of the Old Kingdom/Abhorsen, Seventh Tower and Keys to the Kingdom fantasy series opens up about queer representation, perfectionism and his writing tips.

programme.title: Colette
programme.desc: 90-year-old Colette Marin-Catherine confronts her past by visiting the German concentration camp Mittelbau-Dora where her brother was killed. As a young girl, she fought Hitler's Nazis as a member of the French Resistance. For 74 years, she has refused to step foot in Germany, but that changes when a young history student named Lucie enters her life. Prepared to re-open old wounds and revisit the terrors of that time, Marin-Catherine offers important lessons for us all.

programme.title: On the road
programme.desc: Hundreds of women operate as sex workers along the Strada Bonifica, the ironically named ‘road of love' on the Adriatic coast of Italy. There has been a huge increase in the number of Nigerian women working along the 10-mile stretch of road – some of whom have been trafficked into the country and forced into prostitution. The film moves between the women's stories, the Italians who live and work there and the local NGO, named On the Road, attempting to support the women

programme.title: Made in Britain: Made in Britain
programme.desc: A video journalism project examining poverty, inequality and the challenges our communities face in the wake of the coronavirus pandemic.

programme.title: Is my neighbourhood poisoning me? Living in the shadow of a gasworks redevelopment
programme.desc: Since 2016 residents in Southall have questioned whether the gases released from the redevelopment of an old gasworks site could be damaging their health. We followed them for a year as they grow their campaign group, question the authorities and demand to know if the increased air pollution from the site could have put them at greater risk during the coronavirus pandemic

programme.title: La caravana: On the road with the migrant caravan
programme.desc: Thousands of migrants from Honduras, El Salvador and Guatemala head north hoping to find work and a better life in the US. The largest Central American caravan in decades keeps growing as thousands more join this journey – but when they reach Mexico, the migrant caravan starts taking different directions.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate feels the cost of “having it all”. Anne, with Lionel's support, makes a huge decision for her family. Jenny tries to return to her old life, while Frankie tries to throw hers away.

programme.title: Jekyll and Hyde
programme.desc: Captain Dance is revived by the power of the Incubus and he mounts an attack on Robert.

programme.title: Republic of Doyle
programme.desc: Jake must keep his loose-cannon bail benefactor in check while chasing a dodgy money trail Leslie returns to work but with some conditions Sloan's decisions force Jake into making a deal with the devil.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: The Leverage crew goes after a Serbian adoption agency that's scamming money from desperate American couples looking to adopt needy war orphans. To entrap the ringleader and rescue the children, the team must hijack the local production of an independent horror movie.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: When Parker attends jury duty in order to keep up the legitimacy of one of her aliases, she notices some strange things at the trial. It seems someone is trying to buy a favorable verdict... but not if the Leverage team can steal it first!

programme.title: Ill Gotten Gains
programme.desc: Today we follow police in Wales as they track down organised crime gangs selling drugs out of suburban homes. A luxury yacht, once a criminals pride and joy is now up for sale at a proceeds of crime auction… but how much will it fetch?

programme.title: Thief Trackers
programme.desc: The undercover thief tracker team use GPS technology to trace a criminal who steals a tablet computer. A pub landlord in Bristol tracks the criminals who try to steal his caravan and a young woman turns detective to find her stolen phone.

programme.title: Wives With Knives
programme.desc: Terri Pearson is a transgender woman who's left to survive on the streets. She saves every penny to pay for her transition surgery and meets a man online. The romance blossoms then sours once he starts abusing her and she's forced to fight for her life.

programme.title: Christmas With The Andersons
programme.desc: When Michael Anderson loses his job, it looks like Christmas is cancelled. But when Aunt Katie comes to visit, she shows everyone how to pull off Christmas without money and helps them rediscover what matters most—family.

programme.title: Girlfriends Of Christmas Past
programme.desc: Livvy is heartbroken when her boyfriend dumps her for another girl he's already seeing. She finds two more of his exes and the trio work together to get revenge. Along the way, Livvy meets Carter, and sparks fly. Can she forget about revenge long enough to let a Christmas romance blossom?

programme.title: Holiday Engagement
programme.desc: Afraid to tell her family she's been dumped, Hillary hires an actor to play her fiancé during a four-day Thanksgiving weekend at her parents' house.

programme.title: The Nanny S1E22
programme.desc: Trouble arises when Fran and Grace enter a mother-daughter beauty contest.

programme.title: The Nanny S1E7
programme.sub-title: The Butler, The Husband, The Wife and her Mother
programme.desc: Fran persuades the family to help her dupe a nosy cousin.

programme.title: The Nanny S1E8
programme.desc: Fran hosts a society tea for debutante Maggie.

programme.title: The Nanny S1E9
programme.desc: Though excited to learn that she will be working on Christmas Day, Fran is surprised to hear that Maxwell will be producing a benefit in Washington D.C. Told that the Sheffields will celebrate Christmas one day early, Fran is further disappointed to find that Maxwell farms out all of his gift buying to a personal shopper. So, upon finding that the children don't believe in Santa and that what Grace really wants is to have her father home on Christmas, Fran decides to have a talk with Maxwell -- until Niles points out that he is preparing the staff s Christmas bonuses. Revealing that C.C. will also be joining him in Washington but insisting that their trip will be all business, Maxwell is nonetheless persuaded to do his own shopping for a change. So, when Fran relies on Niles' assessment of her bonus and buys the children some expensive gifts, she discovers that, instead of money, Maxwell bought her a beautiful vase. Faced with having to either take back her gifts or somehow pay the bill, Fran declines Niles' offer of a loan and goes to see Val's Uncle Paulie to pawn the vase. But, when Maxwell mentions it later, Fran guiltily rushes to buy it back and, forced to pay twice what she got, sells her grandmother's watch instead. Receiving a call from Niles with word about Fran and the watch, Maxwell decides to make things right. So, leaving C.C. behind at the airport, he intercepts the family at St. Patrick's Cathedral and finds Fran in a confessional seeking help with her financial difficulties. Finally, after returning the watch and then accidentally sitting on the vase, Maxwell ends up at the hospital being treated for his wounds, while Grace gets her wish and renews her belief in Santa Claus.

programme.title: The Nanny S1E10
programme.desc: Fran contends with Maxwell's old nanny.

programme.title: The Nanny S1E11
programme.desc: Fran's birthday gift leads to a date with a handsome mortician.

programme.title: The Nanny S1E12
programme.desc: Fran and Maxwell clash over Grace's school pageant.

programme.title: The Nanny S1E13
programme.desc: Chloe Simpson, a 1960s supermodel, re-enters ex-flame Maxwell's life, turning the Sheffield household upside down and interfering with the relationship between Fran and Maggie.

programme.title: The Nanny S1E14
programme.desc: Maxwell reveals he has a double standard when it comes to his children and the opposite sex.

programme.title: The Nanny S1E15
programme.desc: While examining Grace for symptoms of the flu, the doctor takes a look at Fran's throat and immediately orders her to the hospital to have her tonsils removed. Meanwhile, C.C. convinces Maxwell to attend her college reunion -- as her "amour," but her plans are foiled when Maxwell stands her up in order to stay by Fran's bedside.

programme.title: The Nanny S1E16
programme.desc: The entire Sheffield clan, including C.C. and Fran, spends the weekend "vacationing" at Fran's parents' house when a blizzard closes the airports and maroons them in Queens. While stranded at the Fines' home, Maggie falls for the boy next door, C.C. crawls in bed with Niles, and Fran finds a love note to her mother -- that's not from her father.

programme.title: The Nanny S1E17
programme.sub-title: Stop The Wedding, I Want To Get Off
programme.desc: Maxwell's sister Jocelyn gets engaged to Nigel, the Duke of Salisbury, but the wedding seems ill-fated after Fran discovers that Jocelyn is really in love with her chauffeur, Lester.

programme.title: The Nanny S1E18
programme.sub-title: Sunday In The Park With Fran
programme.desc: Grace and the son of a prominent theater critic Frank Bradley get in a fight during a trip to the park, and, to break it up, Fran bops the boy with a baguette -- which could mean curtains for Maxwell's newest Broadway play.

programme.title: The Nanny S1E19
programme.desc: Fran's nightmare high school gym teacher has a new job as Maggie's instructor -- and Fran goes back to school to help Maggie pass her gymnastics final.

programme.title: May the Best House Win: North Wales
programme.desc: There are some spooky moments in North Wales today. Well-travelled gran Jean Morgan Roberts lives in a Spanish-style detached house with stunning views over the Menai Straits. Landlady Debbie Crew welcomes the guests to her haunted 17th century pub. Textile artist Sian Jones has filled her detached home with artistic creations and ornaments, and there are more ghostly goings on at the converted police station home of former cop Nigel Williams.

programme.title: Million Pound Movers: Million Pound Movers
programme.desc: With the number of millionaire homeowners rising, the high-end removals industry in the UK is booming. Moving house is said to be one of the most stressful life events, and for those blessed with the finer things in life, the stakes are even higher. Million Pound Movers goes behind closed doors to meet the wealthy clients moving priceless objects, plus the firms tasked with completing the job where one mistake could cost thousands. For these moving firms, demanding clients, unusual requests, and expensive art and furniture all make for a high-risk, yet entertaining business.

programme.title: Lap of Luxury
programme.desc: In episode five, Lap of Luxury experiences history and culture on Lake Tarawera at the truly connected Solitaire Lodge. Become a part of the family-run bliss near Mangawhai, that is Te Arai Lodge. Then head over the Tasman to Orpheus Island Lodge, a tropical escape on the Great Barrier Reef. Step inside the Lap of Luxury and meet the wonderful and passionate people who are the heart and soul of these exquisite properties.

programme.title: Lap of Luxury
programme.desc: In episode six, Lap of Luxury experiences timeless resplendence in Hawke's Bay, at stunning Summerlee and meets the Black Barn Vineyard team who take great care of Summerlee and her guests. Become a part of the Cabot Lodge family and allow yourself to be indulged in Fiordland. Then in the South of Australia, at The Louise, wine meets history in the Barossa Valley. Step inside the Lap of Luxury and meet the wonderful and passionate people who are the heart and soul of these exquisite properties.

programme.title: The Unsellables
programme.desc: Tired of his long daily commute, Gary wants to sell his riverside property next to London's Limehouse Basin and move closer to work… But after six months, only four viewings, and not a single offer, his home is languishing on the market. On the plus side, the three-bedroom, three-bathroom home offers a Thames-view balcony and is close to central London, but with its bachelor pad living room, frilly, pastel-coloured master suite, and confusing guest bedroom-cum-dining room, the property is completely unsellable.

programme.title: The Unsellables
programme.desc: Dennis and Sue are desperate to sell their two-bedroom Thamesmead home so they can permanently reunite in the country… But, after a year on the market, few viewings, four agents, and two major price cuts, Sue's already moved to Norfolk while Dennis is stuck in their unsellable home. Just nine miles from London, the couple's end of terrace property features a conservatory and good-sized garden… But with its cluttered, cigarette-scented interiors, stained walls, and oversized furniture, the dark and gloomy home doesn't stand a chance.

programme.desc: Watch Chris assist a turtle and a cormorant who both require urgent attention.

programme.title: Legendary Heroes King Arthur and the Holy Grail
programme.desc: The legendary King Arthur - his name is inextricably linked with heroic deeds and a golden age of chivalry. Fantastic elements such as the magician Merlin or the search of the knights of the round table for the Holy Grail make his stories bestsellers. There is still a search going on for traces of his existence. Most scientists don't believe in a real King Arthur. For them he is simply the embodiment of an ideal. Real events and people often shine through. But King Arthur remains a phantom.

programme.title: Máxima of the Netherlands
programme.desc: She works to ensure that poor people have access to financial services, better consumer protection and more financial literacy.

programme.title: Inside Buckingham Palace
programme.desc: From Queen Victoria to Queen Elizabeth II and all the ceremonies and scandals inbetween, enter the world of Buckingham Palace.

programme.title: Prince William: A Royal Portrait
programme.desc: The portrait of Prince William, future King of England and one of the most eligible men in the world, builds up a fascinating picture of an extraordinary individual.

programme.title: Sweden's Royal Palace
programme.desc: The King and his sister, Princess Christina, share their childhood memories of the palace. "It wasn't really a nice environment to live in, it was more like a hotel," the King recalls as he describes the rooms where he and his sisters grew up in the south wing of the palace. Crown Princess Victoria shows us priceless objects in her favorite rooms "It's a fantastic cultural heritage and it's impressive that these rooms are preserved, considering how old they are. It's an extraordinary and accessible treasure that belongs to all of us," she says. Viewers also have the opportunity to go behind the scenes before a state visit, hear stories of real ghosts, as well as historians, experts and craftsmen who offer a unique portrait of a national treasure: our Royal Palace.

programme.title: Sweden's Royal Palace
programme.desc: We climb scaffolding to find out more about the facade renovation and get to the bottom of the question of whether the old castle is haunted. Follow us through the gilded halls and dark vaults of the cellars. The Royal Palace in Stockholm has over a thousand rooms and hundreds of years of royal history. The King and his sister, Princess Christina, tell us what it was like to grow up in the palace. Princess Victoria shows priceless objects.

programme.title: The Life Of The Queen
programme.desc: For six decades her face has been on our stamps and money and over 20 million people worldwide tune in to her Christmas Day Speech every year. Whether in tweed or the crown jewels, she's instantly recognizable. Queen Elizabeth II is the most iconic woman in the world.

programme.title: FashionTV Global
programme.desc: FashionTV L'Original

programme.title: FashionTV Global
programme.desc: FashionTV L'Original

programme.title: Taxi Bean
programme.desc: When one of the toy cars of his racing track set becomes broken, Mr. Bean decides to buy a new one.

programme.title: Where Did You Get That Cat?

programme.title: Flat Pack
programme.desc: Mr. Bean's bookcase collapses, so he buys a new one in the hardware store.

programme.title: Coconut Shy
programme.desc: Mr. Bean has to buy a cup for Teddy, but he has no money.

programme.title: The Cruise
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wins two tickets for an exotic cruise and takes Teddy along for the trip of a lifetime.

programme.title: Holiday For Teddy
programme.desc: Mr. Bean takes Teddy on holiday to the seaside.

programme.title: The Robot
programme.desc: Mr. Bean buys a robot to clean his flat, but it ends up creating destruction across London.

programme.title: A Round of Golf
programme.desc: Mr. Bean fancies a game of golf.

programme.title: All You Can Eat
programme.desc: Irma is coming for dinner, but Mr. Bean has forgotten about it and so doesn't have anything to cook.

programme.title: The Newspaper
programme.desc: Every time Bean goes to collect the newspaper from the letterbox, it disappears.

programme.title: Lord Bean

programme.title: Muscle Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean needs to impress Irma, who is infatuated with the hunky deliveryman.

programme.title: Halloween
programme.desc: On Halloween night, Mr. Bean prepares to give the children some tricks and treats they won't forget.

programme.title: The Photograph
programme.desc: The airport personnel refuses to let Mr. Bean take a flight due to his passport having no photo.

programme.title: Super Sky
programme.desc: Fascinated by the super spy show, Mr. Bean decides to become a super spy himself. When he becomes suspicious of the Bruisers planning something, he starts to follow them. Later, he notices that the Bruisers are putting an old lady into a van.

programme.title: Viral Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants to read his book but gets interrupted by too much noise.

programme.title: Home Movie

programme.title: Bean Shopping
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is locked in a department store overnight having the time of his life.

programme.title: A Magic Day Out

programme.title: Jurassic Bean

programme.title: Valuable Lessons

programme.title: Dig This

programme.title: Bean Phone
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants a smartphone but does not have enough money to buy one.

programme.title: Litterbugs
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is furious with the untidy state of the streets so he goes on a one-man mission to clean up the town.

programme.title: Fish Sitting
programme.desc: Mr. Bean has to look after Mrs. Wicket's goldfish.

programme.title: In The Garden
programme.desc: Mr. Bean tries to cut the grass in the garden but finds it impossible.

programme.title: Wrestle Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is trying to read a book but he is disturbed by the noise of Mrs. Wicket and her friend.

programme.title: Misfortune Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja are on a collision course to find the map to stop Nadakhan, they first must find him. Meanwhile, Jay makes a wish to change his future, but it could alter his past indefinitely. The ninja's search for Nadakhan's ship turns up nothing. Nadakhan's crew is struggling to handle an airship which used to sail only on the oceans. Nadakhan confronts Jay and talks him into making a wish that will win him Nya. Jay wishes that he wasn't born in a junkyard and was rich. The next moment, he receives a letter saying his father has died and he has inherited his estate. Jay rushes home to find his parents in the junkyard and finds out they are fine, but they reveal that he is adopted. Jay discovers that his real father is the actor who played his favorite movie hero. In an effort to trap the ninja, the Sky Pirates start raids all over NINJAGO City. Nadakhan kidnaps Kai, who makes two wishes, both of which go wrong. His third wish is to “make it all go away.” Nadakhan's first mate, Flintlocke, accidentally destroys the Realm Crystal and Cole steals Soto's map. The Destiny's Bounty mysteriously vanishes from the police impound yard.

programme.title: The Cloud
programme.desc: A storm is brewing over Knighton. Monstrox has taken the form of a cloud, and is raising an army of lightning infused Stone Monsters. His first target is the new Lavalands Amusement Park. Harmony reigns in Knighton as the Knights pursue their civilian lives: Lance has a TV talk show Axl is the singing chef on the show Jestro is the weatherman Clay is teaching at the Knights' Academy Macy, Ava and Merlok 2.0 travel the land in the Fortrex making sure the kingdom's defenses are ready (part of a plan she and Clay have) Aaron and his hover shield is travelling the land setting extreme records. Robin is at his workshop at the Knights' Academy doing an “independent study” – he's working on some top secret project for Merlok 2.0. It all seems excellent! We even see the Knights new vehicles – which have been optimized for civilian life (except for Clay's.) But storm clouds are brewing. Well, one storm cloud is brewing: the Cloud of Monstrox! Yes, the Book of Monsters has reconstituted himself and is now a cloud who needs a man on the ground to enact his new evil plan. He follows his old buddy Jestro as he goes across the realm on the weekends apologizing for being evil. ZAP! With one bolt of his evil magic lighting, the Cloud of Monstrox turns Jestro evil again (only this time a bit, well, too evil.) The evil duo are back together – and bring stone to life for the first time in the form of Gargoyles from the town of GHOULIA. Now they must gather the Forbidden Powers so that the Cloud of Monstrox can destroy the entire kingdom! A battle breaks out in the Lava Lands, where Lance and Alice Squires are reporting from the opening of the Cuthbert Richmond funded Lava Lands Amusement Park, rebuilt from the remains of Jestro's old HQ. Jestro and the Cloud are after something in the remains and as Merlok 2.0 sends out a call for the Knights to help Lance. Can Lance (with an assist from King Halbert in his Mech) hold-off Jestro, the Cloud and their new army of stone fighters?!

programme.title: A Little Rusty
programme.desc: The Cloud of Monstrox and Jestro unlocks a mysterious Forbidden Power. What kind ofhavoc will they unleash? And can Merlok 2.0 and the NEXO KNIGHTS make the new COMBO NEXO Powers work? The Knights finally make it to the Lava Lands – using their various new forms of transport, which are all strictly civilian vechicles – and they must regroup and learn to fight together again to face the new threat of Jestro, the Cloud of Monstrox, and their STONE MONSTERS (in this case, Stone Gargoyles.) But Jestro and his monsters beat back the knights and recover the STAFF OF MONSTROX – which was buried under the ceremonial chamber from Episode 210 (and is now the Lava Puker amusement park ride) – and they get away on Jestro's EVIL MOBILE, which he recovers from the HQ garage. Macy says this is exactly why she's been touring the kingdom preparing everyone for the next attack. The Knights have to get it together because now the entire kingdom is under threat…again. Robin decides he must upgrade the Knights' vehicles and make them more “fight optimized.” Ava and Merlok 2.0 must figure out how to use new NEXO Powers because regular NEXO Powers do make Stone monsters back into stone, but the Cloud simply zaps them to life again. Meanwhile, in the IRON MOUNTAINS, Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox find the first of the Forbidden Powers: RELENTLESS RUST. They find the ROGUL STATUE holding the power and zap him to life. Now…they can rust those shiny knights to pieces! Ava and Merlok are attempting to use NEXO COMBO POWERS – with hilarious results – as they try to figure out how they might work. When Jestro attacks, he's able to halt the Fortrex by instantly rusting its tracks and wheels! Robin has his hands full trying to clean all the rust from the attack of Relentless Rust. As the Knights attempt to defend against Jestro, the Cloud is zapping statues to life. He hits a statue with a bolt of lightning as Clay is touching it. Something happens…Clay feels odd stiff as if rock is mixing with his body. Finally, Ava and Merlok 2.0 download to the Knights their new thing: a COMBO NEXO COMBO Power. It works! It can smash the animated statues to dust! They use it to defeat Jestro, but he and the Cloud get away with the Forbidden Power of Relentless Rust. Victory … sort of. Clay talks to Merlok 2.0…something has happened to him. What can they do? Merlok 2.0 is very concerned.

programme.title: Thunderstox
programme.desc: Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox encounters the sculptor. He helps unleash a horde of fierce garden gnomes on Knighton. What will the NEXO KNIGHTS do against this new enemy? Will their new COMBO NEXO Powers do the trick? As Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox head off on the Evil Mobile to 'store' the Forbidden Power in a secret location, they encounter…THE SCULPTOR. His real name is ROBERTO ARNOLDI. He's a sensitive and odd artist who has been laid off by the king (the King ordered a "smashing" statue of the Queen, and the Sculptor made a statue of the Queen literally smashing monsters. He takes everything very literally.) Jestro instructs him to make a "bad" statue that he can use to attack the knights. The Sculptor sets to work. Meanwhile, the NEXO KNIGHTS are discussing the COMBO NEXO Powers, the Forbidden Powers, and what all this means. Lance, meanwhile, decides that since his talk show career is on hold, he thinks he'll install cameras in the Fortrex and do a Big Brother-like expose show on the Knights (he decides NOT to tell the others.) Merlok 2.0 and the Cloud of Monstrox (each talking to their cohorts) explain the history of the Forbidden Powers: it's a history lesson about the WIZARDS' COUNCIL, the Forbidden Powers, and how they were stopped long ago. This visual montage leads Jestro to…MOUNT THUNDERSTROX. The Cloud of Monstrox shows him the circle of ten Standing Stones where he will insert the Forbidden Powers. "What'll happen after that?” asks Jestro, curious. "Oh, I don't want to spoil the surprise," says the Cloud. They insert the first Forbidden Power, Relentless Rust, and it locks into place on its stone. They go off to battle the Knights and collect the "bad" statue the sculptor is making. But he's made a literally bad statue…it's terrible ... garden gnomes. Like an amateur art student. And…it's not even finished. ("You can't rush bad genius!") The Knights attack with their newly modified vehicles and they succeed in destroying the Evil Mobile. They then try to use a COMBO NEXO Power, but can't…it had to be perfect to work (Ava and Merlok need to work on it.) As Jestro and the Cloud retreat, Merlok again talks to Clay about turning to stone! Merlok calls in Robin…he will need him to build something to help Clay as he becomes more and more impaired.

programme.title: Weekend At Halberts
programme.desc: Party time in Knighton! The mood is down so the King decides to throw a party. In the meantime Jestro attacks the Fortrex, but he is confronted with the new NEXO Power "The Wedgie of Doom". Clay is turned to stone and everyone is gloomy. Especially King Halbert. In order to get everything in a better mood Aaron organizes a celebration. The King wants a reenactment of Clay's heroic rescue of the Queen. He is (as usual) totally unaware of Clay's situation. In order not to disappoint him further, the Knights get a remote control for Clay's Battle suit and is thus able to “perform” as Clay. Lance is happy to exercise his acting abilities and quickly gets into the role of the uptight knight of knights. Ava is working on reinstalling Merlok 2.0 into the Fortrex with Robin. She is also preparing the Fortrex for a visit from the new Knights' Academy novices. It is a fieldtrip with Principal Brickland and Sir Griffiths with the goal of teaching the kids about these new so-called High-tech battle strategies. Not really feeling it for anything modern, it quickly turns into a regular trip back memory lane for Brickland and Sir Griffiths. This out of control excursion is an excellent moment for Jestro who is looking for an opportunity to cheer up the defeated Monstrox. Unfortunately, for Jestro, Ava is able to make Merlok 2.0 functional again, and the Novices are able to fight Jestro and his monsters off using the NEXO Power: Wedgie of Doom. It is a humiliating defeat. Apparently, this is just what the doctor ordered for Monstrox. A good laugh at someone else's expense. His evil mood is back on.

programme.title: Awakening
programme.desc: When Mateo's comic creation, Z-Blob, follows him from a dream back to Brooklyn, Mateo and his sister realize the Dream World is real, and in danger!

programme.title: Dream Chasers
programme.desc: After a daring mission to save their friend in the Dream World, Mateo and Izzie find the nightmare has followed them back to the Waking World.

programme.title: Legacy, Vehicle and Mechs
programme.desc: Zane takes help from Nya for backup memories of their adventures to the Samurai X Cave computer, but Zane encounters a mysterious puzzle buried deep within his code. Nya digitizes Jay and uploads him into Zane's mind. Jay reviews memories of the Ninja's various motorcycles, mechs and planes in order to solve the vehicle-themed puzzle.

programme.title: The Oni And The Dragon
programme.desc: While Princess Harumi learns to adjust to the life of a Ninja, Lloyd and Jay search for answers about the Oni Masks at Mystake's Tea house, while Cole and Zane attempt to infiltrate the Sons of Garmadon biker gang. Remembering that Lloyd managed to arrest one of the gang members at Borg Tower, the Ninja decide to interrogate him to ascertain the location of the third Oni Mask. In order to get him to talk, however, Cole suggests they visit MYSTAKE'S TEA HOUSE to obtain some "truth tea." The truth-tea backfires spectacularly when Cole accidentally switches cups and drinks the tea himself. Zane is able to salvage the situation, however, and obtains a lead. He learns that the Sons of Garmadon frequent a karaoke bar called LAUGHY'S. Zane and Cole don disguises to infiltrate the bar. Cole assumes the alter ego “Rocky Dangerbuff," while Zane adopts the subtler moniker "Snake Jaguar." In order to earn the gang's trust, Cole performs a karaoke routine that is a smash success. Unfortunately, during the routine, his disguise comes loose and he is exposed as a ninja. The Sons of Garmadon attack him, and Zane (who is still in disguise) is unable to intervene. Cole is taken prisoner while Zane is invited back to the Sons of Garmadon's secret base.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: Spooky Sensation
programme.desc: The girls decided to spend a weekend at the hotel. It appears to be haunted. Watch the full video to know more about this.

programme.title: Sings of Love
programme.desc: See how Stephanie and Olivia enter the Under the Sea photo competition. Jacob wrote a love song! Olivia and her friends are very excited to hear. Tanya and Stephanie are teamed up in baking class. Watch the video for more fun.

programme.title: Video Wonder
programme.desc: Olivia and Andrea visited science camp with Mrs Stevens. On the other hand, Andrea and Mia decides to return a lost skunk to nature. Andrea was reading intimate postcards between Chef Pierre and Mrs. Stevens.

programme.title: Stiix and Stones
programme.desc: The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply so the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks – and when they fail to make enough cash, the Ninja decide to steal it – but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but when the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply, the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks. Meanwhile, reluctant to give up being Samurai X, Nya struggles to embrace being a Water Ninja, and Sensei Wu gives her a riddle to figure out. Back at Stiix, when the Ninja fail to make enough cash working the docks, the Ninja decide to steal it... but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. After Moro gets away with the scroll, the Ninja are left dangling, but Ronan saves them at a price – for a piece of their share in the Tea Farm.

programme.title: Girls on Mission
programme.desc: Things are getting mixed up on Andrea's first day on the job at Heartlake City Juicebar.Mia and Stephanie have to use a little horse power at the Sunshine Ranch.Andrea relaxes at the beach while Emma is hard at work at her lifeguard tower.Olivia tapes a science show, with a little help from Mia's lemonade stand - and special effects!Emma and Stephanie accidentally rent a scary movie and suddenly there are beasts everywhere...Stephanie has to face her fears when the class gets an 'Animal Kingdom & 'school assignment.'

programme.title: The Hands Of Time
programme.desc: Master Wu mistakenly tries to single-handedly complete a battle he began decades ago against Acronix, one of the twin Hands of Time. But the arrival of the first Time Blade – a weapon with the power to speed up time – sends the Ninja to the Monastery just in time to rescue their master from certain doom.

programme.title: The Hatching
programme.desc: The Ninja learn more about the Krux and Acronix – the two fallen Elemental Masters known as the Hands of Time – and are sure that this threat has finally been eliminated. But with Wu out of action and suffering from the effects of the Time Punch, the Ninja discover a new enemy in their midst: The Vermillion Warriors. And the Ninjas have no idea who controls them...

programme.title: A Time Of Traitors
programme.desc: Kai's investigation of a Vermillion Warrior Helmet leads him to discover that Krux is alive and well in Ninjago, living under an assumed identity. Meanwhile, as the Vermillion Warriors go on a kidnapping spree, Lloyd struggles with his role as master-in-training and Nya does her best to reboot Zane, who was knocked off line in his first battle with the Vermillion.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Now that Megatron's body is rebuilt, he leads the Decepticons in his search for the AllSpark.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and his band of Autobots are taken off the job.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Silas is given a bizarre new lease on life, and approaches Megatron with a plan to join the Decepticon ranks.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Jack pairs off with Smokescreen to further educate him about navigating the human world.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots learn of the Omega Keys and the incredible secret they hold.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Decepticons, Megatron, Starscream, and Scorponok attack Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Using Unicron, Megatron has discovered a powerful source of energy: Super Energon.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Galvatron has Sixshot start moving Cybertron towards the planet where Alpha Q's "soul" is.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus teams up with Sentinel Prime in order to defeat the Headmaster.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Unaware of the Decepticon activity, the Elite Guard take Optimus Prime and the Autobots back to Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The AllSpark creates a new Autobot out of pieces of garbage.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Dinobots, Predacons, and Terrorcons suddenly desert their fellow Transformers.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Decepticons steal the Autobot Matrix of Leadership.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Quintessons locked the planet Zamojin in a space-warp and isolated it from the rest of the universe.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: Return of the Optimus Prime, Part 1
programme.desc: Scientists infects Autobots and Decepticons with a plague that will pit them against their own kind.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The race for the Omega Keys grows more desperate.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfette's Rose: Smurfette promises Mother Nature that if she creates a blue rose Smurfette will never cut it. But when the white rose becomes blue, Smurfette becomes white. The only way to make Smurfette blue again is for her to cut the rose. She reluctantly cuts the rose, returning nature to normalcy and learning that one cannot always keep a promise.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Gargamel The Generous: In an effort to find out where the Smurfs' secret diamond stash is hidden, Gargamel pretends to be their friend. When he shows his true, wicked self, Papa Smurf works a magic spell to save his little Smurfs from the vicious clutches of the evil wizard.

programme.title: The Smurfomatic Smurfolator
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel still wants to destroy the Smurfs. This time, he sends on the forest the seeds of a creeping weed that is sure to entangle all the Smurfs… But Handy Smurf has devised a smurfomatic smurfolator...

programme.title: Mud-Wrestling Smurfs
programme.desc: The Wartmongers are draining Smurf River to make mud for their wrestling matches. Clumsy, who has been feeling like a loser at sports, becomes a hero when he must wrestle the Mad Maher as a distraction, enabling Papa and Hefty to break into the factory and destroy the mud making machine.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Last Laugh: Gargamel has found a new diabolical scheme to get rid of the Smurfs: a glittering powder that is going to reduce them to helpless laughter...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Greedy Goes On Strike: Get up early in the morning, before any other Smurf is out of bed, to prepare a scrumptious Smurfberry muffin. Spend all morning on preparing Smurf delicacies for lunch. Than all afternoon to have dinner ready – and delicious – on time. And do you get so much as a thank you form the Smurfs? So Greedy Smurf quits. The Village is in trouble... And soon, so is Greedy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Golden Smurf Award: Hogatha disguises herself as the Golden Smurf Award to catch the Smurfs in order to use them as the main ingredient in her beauty cream. Vanity convinces her to try his recipe and before long, the wicked sorceress is covered with mud and sent careening over the hills into Gargamel's house.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Blue Plague: Brainy Smurf has decided to dedicate himself to the wellbeing of his fellow Smurfs. He is going to cure them of all ills… With a little help from the evil Gargamel!

programme.title: The Bad Place
programme.desc: What is this little moon coming from above? Why, it's a crater-pockmarked globe of mud inhabited by the Grimeys, a family of mud-splattering, mud-eating creatures from out there in the sky. Not all the Smurfs are enthusiastic about the visitors....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Chief Record Smurf: Due to a wild experiment Clumsy is able to store endless knowledge into his memory. Gargamel captures him, trying to unlock Papa Smurf's invisibility formula, but at the last minute, Clumsy tricks him with the wrong ingredients.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Locomotive Smurfs: Handy Smurf has hit on a revolutionary new idea: a sort of smurfless carriage that moves on railroad tracks. He calls it a railsmurfer and it makes for less work in the Village... until Gargamel chances upon it.

programme.title: Beauty Is Only Smurf Deep
programme.desc: Periwinkle, a vain Pixie, is upset when her magic mirror tells her that Vanity is the fairest, not she. Periwinkle kidnaps Vanity, but the rest of the Smurfs come to Vanity's rescue. Periwinkle sees the error of her ways and they become friends.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Kow-Tow, We Won't Bow: Smurfette leads the Smurflings on a nature hike, but Puppy gets too far ahead and they chase him into the land of the Wartmongers. King Bullrush captures them in bubbles and imprisons them. A group of rebels rescue the Smurflings and they escape on the back of Puppy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Littlest Viking: The Smurfs take Grandpa Smurf to the King's castle so that he can meet Peewit. But what with one thing and another (especially another), the Smurfs and Peewit are taken aboard a Viking long ship. The Vikings take Peewit to be their mythical Great Warrior, the one who is going to vanquish the Storm King. Can the Smurfs help Peewit out of his quandary?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Handy's Sweetheart: Handy learns it's better to have smurfed than not to have smurfed at all when he learns his true love is really a mermaid. Can they really live with each other forever?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Sand Witch: A swamp monster kidnaps Baby as a gift for a witch. The witch, who thinks no one loves her, is amazed when Baby shows affection. When Papa comes to rescue Baby, he makes the witch understand that the loyal swamp monster has always loved her.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurf The Other Cheek: Hefty Smurf meets an old Trolless in the forest, and the old crone begs him to relieve her of a red spot on her nose by... giving her a good kick here and now! Hefty half-heartedly obliges... And the result is a big surprise for him!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Tattle-Tail Smurfs: Brainy Smurf's had enough. The Smurflings and Sassette keep on telling tales about him with unpleasant results. He therefore concocts a magic formula, taken from Papa Smurf's books of spells, which makes the little Smurfs' tails grow longer and longer every time they tell tales. What he hasn't counted on is that Gargamel now has a way of catching the Smurflings.

programme.title: The First Telesmurf
programme.desc: Papa Smurf pours a magic potion over the new Smurf-melon patch, which instantly grows and grows all over the village and forest. The Smurfs use the blossoms as a telephone, but before Gargamel can trace their voices, the flowers turn into melons and telesmurf is no more.

programme.title: Return To Don Smurfo
programme.desc: When a drop of Papa Smurf's new potion spills on the Smurflings' adventure book, the fictional hero springs to life. The dashing Don Smurfo, willing to rid the Smurf of the evil Gargamel, gallantly captures him...

After losing her daughter and granddaughter, the cantankerous owner Josephine has let it fall into disrepair. But now, stranded by the blizzard, with Lisa giving birth, everyone comes together to provide what they all need most - a family.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner… his mom!

programme.title: Fishtronaut
programme.desc: The series tells the story of Fishtronaut, a fish in a spacesuit, similar to reverse scuba gear, which allows him to fly and breathe out of water.

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green's new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he's the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: The Sunny Bunnies are five fluffy balls of light named Turbo, Big Boo, Shiny, Iris and Hopper who can appear anywhere there is light. The Bunnies always bring joy and happiness, beaming down to explore new and exciting locations, finding fun and mischievous games to enjoy.

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: The Secrets of Honey Hills
programme.desc: Honey Hills is a small seaside town where all kind of animals live. It's a good neighbourhood. However, mysterious and inexplicable events sometimes cause misunderstandings among neighbours. Then, genius detective Sophie the Owl together with her young assistant Chirp the Squirrel take up the investigation.

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: The Inbestigators
programme.desc: Amelia resents her fundraising cupcake stall being upstaged by a lemonade stall.

programme.title: The Inbestigators

programme.title: The Inbestigators
programme.desc: Some eleven year olds wash dishes for pocket money, others solve crimes.

programme.title: The Inbestigators
programme.desc: Pixie is horrified when her space diorama goes missing.

programme.desc: The timer on Mrs Maniaci's sprinkler system is tampered with before the competition!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 227: Friends 'til the End Part 2
programme.desc: Though Joey decimates Yugi's life points, Yugi can't bring himself to attack his dear friend. Yugi summons Joey's favorite monster Red-Eyes Black Dragon to bring Joey back to his senses.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 228: Friends 'til the End Part 3
programme.desc: Yugi starts to break Marik's spell over Joey, but he now must duel without the Millennium Puzzle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 229: Friends 'til the End Part 4
programme.desc: There's only one minute left in the duel before the loser is sent plummeting to the depths of the sea. Will these best friends actually send each other to their doom?

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E20
programme.desc: The Egyptian leg of the World Championships culminates with the final match highlighting F Dynasty against the BBA Revolution. The day before the match, Tyson has Daichi practice moves with him that they're not usually accustomed to doing: namely, tag-team attacks.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E21
programme.desc: Tyson is feeling the pressure of being World Champion. Despite Hiro's warning, a television crew follows him around for a day, taping his every move. Daichi feels jealous and tries to compete for the camera's attention.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E22
programme.desc: The final elimination round is underway, with F Dynasty trying to earn the last play-off slot, while their opponents, the already mathematically eliminated Barthez Battalion try to spoil their chances.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E23
programme.sub-title: RAY AND KAI: THE ULTIMATE FACE-OF
programme.desc: With Lee losing to Tala early in the match, White Tiger X is a game down, and Kai now steps up to battle for the Blitzkrieg Boys. This round is sure to be intense, as old teammates face off in the dish.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E24
programme.desc: The tournament in Australia continues and this round pits the PPB All Starz against Tyson and the BBA Revolution. The first battle sees Daichi playing against Rick. Daichi seems a little over confident going into battle as his sights are set on the bigger prize, fighting in the finals with Tyson. Rick on the other hand is more realistic.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E25
programme.desc: Tyson and Max face off against each other in the semi-final of the World Beyblading Championships. The two old friends use two totally different blading styles in the dish.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E26
programme.desc: With three teams qualifying for the finals of the World Beyblade Championships - the Blitzkrieg Boys, the BBA Revolution, and F Dynasty - the BBA must make a decision. Only two teams can play in the finals, and a format to determine which ones will compete must be decided.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E27
programme.desc: The entire city is pumped for Tyson and Daichi's rematch with F Dynasty in double-team play. At first, the awesome power of BBA Revolution has Raul and Julia on their heels. Raul manages to save Julia from a stadium out and his big sister lets him take command.

programme.title: Om Nom Stories: Om Nom Stories: New Neighbors
programme.sub-title: Picnic (Episode 228) / Om Nom Stories: New Neighbors - The Party Quest / Om Nom Stories: New Neighbors - The Great Party Quest (Episode 247)
programme.desc: Om Nom goes on a series of picnics with his friends, and each picnic is special. Before unpacking the food, Handsome needs to preen, and Scientist Nom needs some impressive gadgets for a comfortable stay. Baby Angry brings something more capacious than a picnic basket, and Starra brings a smile to Om Nom's bouquet. And Nibble Nom saves Om Nom and Om Nelle from the last piece of the cake! / Om Nom understands that organizing a party is no small feat. To simplify things, he creates a well-prepared checklist of tasks he needs to accomplish. First on the list is setting the party mood - check! Next, he sends out invitations - check! And let's not forget the scrumptious carrot cake - check! However, Om Nom faces an unexpected obstacle when it comes to choosing the perfect music. Luckily, his loyal friends and neighbours step in to help. Finally, the moment arrives to rejoice and have an amazing time. Hooray, it's party time and everyone gathers to celebrate! / Om Nom gets frustrated waiting in line, so he tries to find ways to make things faster. But his shortcuts lead to unexpected problems. He ends up looking like a watermelon, trying to reach a yummy jar of jam, and even finds himself behind the cashier's counter. Luckily, a helpful friend always comes to his rescue. And just when you think the fun is over, Om Nom leads everyone to even more excitement!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories: Om Nom Stories: New Neighbors
programme.sub-title: Busy Day (Episode 248) / Om Nom Stories: New Neighbors - Postal Puzzles (Episode 249) / Om Nom Stories: New Neighbors - Grown-up Imposter
programme.desc: What a busy day for Om Nom! His peaceful refreshing swim was interrupted by his friend's plans. Photographing Baby Angry turned out to be a challenge with every shot capturing anything, but her face. / Om Nom has an important job to do he needs to deliver parcels to all his friends in the neighbourhood. Wow, it's trickier than he thought! But the real fun is seeing what's inside each package! Hmm, some boxes are very small... do you believe they house super big things inside? Yes, they do! And hey, did that box just move? Yes! There's a package that escapes, initiating a thrilling pursuit. Want to know what's inside it? Let's find out together in this fun story! / Om Nom takes little Nibble Nom to school and is amazed when Nibble Nom crafts fantastic clay creations! Feeling adventurous, he sneaks in, trying his hand as a student. But oh no! Clay is super challenging for Om Nom. And his attempts lead to giggly mess-ups. But as classes roll on, Om Nom gathers clever tricks. So when pals are in a pinch, Om Nom's there, brilliantly using his new skills to the rescue. And as the day ends, a cheeky secret about Om Nom awaits discovery. Want to know what happened? Watch this funny episode!

programme.desc: The year is 1972 and like most high-school students, Betsy Jobs (Kirsten Dunst) and Arlene Lorenzo (Michelle Williams) just want to have a good time. But when, during a class field trip to the White House, they cluelessly wander into a behind-closed-doors, top-secret shredding session, it's time toboth wag the dog, and walk it. Seeking to uncover just how much the witless duo discovered, the Commander-In-Chief, appoints them "Official White House Dog Walkers," and it isn't long before the girls go from taking out Checkers, to taking out Tricky Dick, in this fun-raising comedy of historic distortions.

They juggle their work traveling around the world while seeing each other again. Both know there's something special between them, but it will be put to the test when Kade's competitive boss challenges Kade to thwart Nicole's business.

James must learn about sacrificing for the ones he loves, even at the expense of his own dreams.

Her last novel wasn't a big success so when her editor Diana recommends teaming up Colin, a Navy SEAL who also happens to be her brother, she jumps at the opportunity. Jo's enthusiasm quickly turns to dread as she realizes that Colin has signed her up for his Navy SEAL training Boot Camp.
