programme.desc: When Vanessa returns home for Christmas, her name comes up for a huge promotion back at work! She is torn between taking the job or staying home to take over the family clinic, while her visit has rekindled an old romance as well.

programme.title: Finding Mrs. Claus
programme.desc: When Mrs. Claus (Mira Sorvino) feels neglected by her less than attentive husband (Will Sasso), she goes to Las Vegas to help a little girl with her Christmas wish.

programme.title: Christmas For Three
programme.desc: When a successful bachelor suddenly finds himself as the guardian of a 10 year old boy, he leans on the smart and beautiful social worker for help, only to fall in love with the woman who turned his life upside down.

programme.title: The Decoy Bride
programme.desc: A heart-warming romantic comedy about an ordinary girl who is hired to be the decoy for the most famous bride in the world.

programme.title: The Loss Adjuster
programme.desc: Hapless Insurance Loss Adjuster - Martin Dyer - feels his life is spiralling out of control but discovers that even when you reach rock bottom, that some clouds really do have a silver lining.

programme.title: My Bakery in Brooklyn
programme.desc: When Chloe and Vivien inherit their aunt's bakery the sparks fly as each has very different ideas for it's future. The solution - a line down the middle of the shop. But will a little romance put some icing on these hot cakes?

programme.title: Hopscotch
programme.desc: Grounded with a desk job by incompetent superiors, a clever CIA agent retires and writes a tell all memoir that will embarrass his bosses, prompting him to go on the run and elude them.

programme.title: Venus
programme.desc: A family comedy about a transitioning woman who discovers that she's the father of a 14 year old boy.

programme.title: Saints and Soldiers 3: Battle of the Tanks
programme.desc: The German war machine is in retreat. Two American M 18 tank destroyers are sent to root out a die hard group of Nazis holed up in the Harz Mountains.

programme.title: They Made Me a Criminal
programme.desc: A boxer flees believing he has comitted a murder while he was drunk.

programme.title: Lobby, The
programme.desc: The lobby of a rundown hotel. Two lively employees dream of a better life. But when reality steps in, even their present world is shattered.

programme.title: Litorai
programme.desc: A short documentary that tells the story of a town, a marriage and a way of understanding life that only remains in memories.

programme.title: Roaring Abyss
programme.desc: A sound journey accros the mountains, deserts and forests of Ethiopia and its cultural universe. Roaring Abyss will take you through an inedit collection of music recordings of unvaluable importance for the transmission and preservation of the African heritage.

programme.title: The Lightkeepers
programme.desc: Seth Atkins (Academy Award Winner, RICHARD DREYFUSS) is the light keeper on a deserted outer beach of Cape Cod in the year 1912. Seths assistant suddenly quits, no longer able to tolerate his bad attitude and hate for women. He is left to manage the lighthouse on his own, until a mysterious, strapping young man washes up on shore with the desire to become Seths new assistant. They eventually swap tales from their past, beginning to explain each of their distaste for women. Its not long before the two men must contend with the lovely Ruth Graham (MAMIE GUMMER) and her housekeeper, Mrs. Bascom (Golden Globe Nominee BLYTHE DANNER) who move into a nearby cottage for the summer.

programme.title: Trouble In Texas
programme.desc: Rodeo stars are being killed with poisoned needles, and Tex Ritter is next on the list.

programme.title: Charade
programme.desc: Romance and suspense ensue in Paris as a woman is pursued by several men who want a fortune her murdered husband had stolen. Who can she trust?

programme.title: Timeline: Timeline
programme.desc: Based on the Michael Crichton novel. TIMELINE tells the story of a professor who inadvertently catapults himself back to 14th-century France, in the middle of the 100 Years War.

programme.title: Relative Values
programme.desc: When a star and Hollywood Diva Miranda Frayle brek up, a playboy prince with a stiff upper lip sweeps her off her feet and boldly takes her home to meet his high class society minded mother.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: A raven-haired enchantress, Cassie Nightingale, mysteriously moves into the local haunted mansion, 'Grey House', and seems to change her neighbors lives using a hint of magic causing many to think she's a witch.

programme.title: Foster
programme.desc: A heart-warming story of family and friendship starring Academy Award Nominee Toni Collette and Ioan Gruffudd.

programme.title: The Heist
programme.desc: A comedy centered on three museum security guards who devise a plan to steal back the artworks to which they have become attached after they are transferred to another museum. Starring: Morgan Freeman, Christopher Walken, Joseph McKenna, Wynn Everett

programme.title: 10,000 Days
programme.desc: Ten thousand days ago, Comet 23 struck Earth with the magnitude of all the nuclear weapons in the world sending the planet into a deep freeze. Now, 27 years in the future, those who survived are locked in an epic battle of life or death.

programme.title: Exceptional Beings
programme.desc: Two supernatural beings question their divine status when they meet an ordinary woman with a disturbing essence: a human being who does not correspond to what their millennia of knowledge of humanity has taught them.

programme.title: Native
programme.desc: A signal from the other side of the universe is received by a hive-like society. Two scientists, Cane and Eva, are chosen to leave home and journey many light years to find and colonise the distant world that sent this transmission. As their telepathic connection to home weakens, they begin to question the morality of the mission and the very meaning of their own existence in the isolation of deep space.

programme.title: The Penitent Man
programme.desc: When a mysterious client reveals he is from the future, a psychologist heeds the man's warning and sets out to change the course of his life.

programme.title: Chariot
programme.desc: In this dark and twisted thriller, John Malkovich stars as Dr. Karn, an odd, eccentric specialist who guides unknowing patients through the reincarnation transition. When Harrison (Thomas Mann) experiences mysterious recurring dreams, he turns to Dr. Karn for help and reveals his encounter with a woman (Rosa Salazar) he loved in a previous life. Noticing a glitch in the system, the doctor must fix the issue before permanently derailing his patient's future.

programme.title: I Am That
programme.desc: A nun's eight-day adventure to resolve questions of doubt unites her with a gentle teenager and a handsome drifter who affects her heart and future.

programme.title: What Would Jesus Do? The Journey Continues
programme.desc: The journey continues from What Would Jesus Do? (2010) as the drifter arrives into a new town inspiring a group of people to live as Jesus would.

programme.title: An Hour Behind
programme.desc: The time change and a case of mistaken identity result in a wonderful blind date for Trish and Parker, but is it enough to keep them together?

programme.title: Undercover Angel
programme.desc: When a little girl prays for a miracle to help her recently divorced mother settle in their new town and fixer-upper house, an angel posing as a handyman, is sent down from heaven to help. While trying to accomplish his mission, the angel falls for the mother, ultimately forcing him into the unlikeliest of choices.

programme.title: Discreet
programme.desc: Monique, a high-class escort, has always given her clients what they wanted, while clean-cut Thomas, has always been what everyone has expected.

programme.title: The Ex
programme.desc: A slacker is forced to work for his father-in-law after his pregnant wife steps away from her high-paying job.

programme.title: Playing for Keeps
programme.desc: Playing For Keeps is a romantic comedy about a charming, down on- his luck former soccer star (Gerard Butler) who returns home to put his life back together. Looking for a way to rebuild his relationship with his son, he gets roped into coaching the boy's soccer team. But his attempts to finally become an “adult” are met with hilarious challenges from the attractive “soccer moms” who pursue him at every turn.

programme.title: Romance Retreat
programme.desc: After a break-up, journalist Dana Willingham finds herself alone and stuck at a couple's yoga retreat while the biggest story of her career breaks far away. But when she meets handsome fellow retreater Stefan Gonzales who's lying low after being the center of a scandal, she smells a good story. As she gains his trust and the pair get closer, will she choose the perfect story or the perfect man?

programme.title: Finding Love in Mountain View
programme.desc: After learning she's been entrusted to take care of her deceased cousin's children, an architect is torn between focusing on her career and honouring her cousin's wish.

programme.title: Hurricane Season
programme.desc: A basketball coach has a winning team when Hurricane Katrina hits. He tries to build a winning team anew.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Good Deeds
programme.desc: A businessman is jolted out of his scripted life when he meets a single mother who cleans his office.

programme.title: The Contractor
programme.desc: Elizabeth is remodeling her home and hires a contractor. Soon she learns he'd targeted the family all along.

programme.title: Deepwater Horizon
programme.desc: Mark Wahlberg leads an all-star cast in the thrilling story of real-life heroes on a burning oil rig.

programme.title: Love N' Dancing
programme.desc: Jessica (Amy Smart) had given up on her dream of a life of the stage, until she meets ex-dance champion Jake (Tom Malloy), who becomes her teacher when the couple make an instant connection. Together, they decide to risk it all when they enter the World Swing Championship to reclaim Jake's former title.

programme.title: Cold Brook
programme.desc: One fateful evening, after working late hours at the museum, two maintenance workers see a man standing silently near a Civil War exhibit. Despite chasing him away, each night he returns. Soon Ted and George learn that no one else can see the mysterious figure dressed in centuries-old clothing his name is Gil Le Doux and he's searching for a way home.

programme.title: The Robot Giant
programme.desc: A great war has just finished and the dust is settling across a vast wasteland when a giant robot, finds himself wandering, lost and alone. Luckily, he stumbles into a tiny, hapless robot who has lost his memory and is now stuck with his new companion. Together, the pair decide to journey across the desert in search of Ram, the creator of all robots, to learn more about themselves. Along the way, the pair quickly become close friends as an array of adventures and mishaps teach them that where you belong is wherever you are happiest and that to learn who you are, you just need to listen to your heart. A fun, lively and heart-warming adventure, The Robot Giant is a vibrant animation perfect for all family!

programme.title: 12 in a Box
programme.desc: 12 IN A BOX is the laugh-out-loud story of 12 former school friends who get together for a reunion they will never forget, where they are given the chance to win a life-changing 1million each. The only catch is, they cannot leave the estate for 96 hours, and anyone who enters the grounds must also stay for the duration! With time ticking away, the mismatched dozen are forced to work together to keep the peace and work toward their payday. But, when they have to deal with an untimely death, a kidnapping plot, another corpse, burglars, and then even a visit from the boys in blue, will this hapless clan be able to hold it together or will their dreams of riches be buried with the bodies? Staring Miranda Hart (Miranda, Call the Midwife) and Katy Wix (Not Going Out), this is classic British farce at its best.

programme.title: The Counterfeiter
programme.desc: The Usual Suspects meets The Fight Club. Described as "cinema perfection" this twisty crime thriller, stars action legend Yun-Fat Chow (Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon). Hong Kong police are hunting an exceptional counterfeiting gang led by a mastermind code-named Painter. To crack the identity of the "Painter", police recruit a gang member a hunt which leads to further deceit and bloodshed.

programme.title: Furious
programme.desc: A visually stunning, historical epic, based on the extraordinary real-life events surrounding the Mongol capture of the Russian city of Ryazan. As the Mongol hordes begin ransacking Russia, the invaders pillage and burn down cities, until Kolovrat leads several hundred brave souls to avenge his love, his people and his homeland. A breath-taking tale of courage and self-sacrifice for one's country.

programme.title: Mr. Jones
programme.desc: A highly-compelling political thriller from award-winning director Agniezka Holland. Welsh journalist Gareth Jones (James Norton: Little Women) risks his life to expose the truth about the devastating famine in the Soviet Union in the early 1930s. Also starring Vanessa Kirby (The Crown) and Golden Globe Nominee Peter Sarsgaard (The Batman). This is the most important true story you will ever see.

programme.title: Mercenary for Justice
programme.desc: Steven Seagal plays tough mercenary John Seeger in this high octane actioner. When Seeger is blackmailed into leading a highly dangerous rescue attempt to free a billionaire's kidnapped son in South Africa, he commits to the job. But when he discovers that he's been double-crossed the gloves come off - and now there's going to be hell to pay. Also starring Luke Goss and Michael Kenneth Williams.

programme.title: The Perfect Christmas Village
programme.desc: Darcy finds herself magically transported to her dream Christmas village where she can enjoy her perfect Christmas every day. But will she ever find true love and the perfect boyfriend? (2018)

programme.title: The Perfect Christmas Village
programme.desc: Darcy finds herself magically transported to her dream Christmas village where she can enjoy her perfect Christmas every day. But will she ever find true love and the perfect boyfriend? (2018)

programme.title: A Snow White Christmas
programme.desc: Bianca's stepmother attempts to cheat her out of her inheritance.

programme.title: A Snow White Christmas
programme.desc: Bianca's stepmother attempts to cheat her out of her inheritance.

programme.title: Christmas On Ice
programme.desc: A former figure skater and a former hockey player work together to stop the mayor from closing the local skating rink. Starring Abigail Klein (2020)

programme.title: Christmas On Ice
programme.desc: A former figure skater and a former hockey player work together to stop the mayor from closing the local skating rink. Starring Abigail Klein (2020)

programme.title: The Christmas Apprentice
programme.desc: Riley is sent to Vermont at Christmas to close a business. Her task becomes complicated when she falls in love and sees how important the company is to the local community. Chevy Chase stars. (2016)

programme.title: The Christmas Apprentice
programme.desc: Riley is sent to Vermont at Christmas to close a business. Her task becomes complicated when she falls in love and sees how important the company is to the local community. Chevy Chase stars. (2016)

programme.title: Christmas Connection
programme.desc: A flight attendant's Christmas plans unravel when she is asked to look after an unaccompanied minor. Will she accept an invitation to spend Christmas with the young girl and her father? (2018)

programme.title: Christmas Connection
programme.desc: A flight attendant's Christmas plans unravel when she is asked to look after an unaccompanied minor. Will she accept an invitation to spend Christmas with the young girl and her father? (2018)

programme.title: Love by Chance
programme.desc: Claire, a pastry chef, is busy running her new restaurant, but her meddling mother is preoccupied with her lack of love life. Without her knowledge, Claire's mother finds her the perfect man. (2016)

programme.title: Love's Sweet Recipe
programme.desc: Courtney is a talented chef who has taken over the running of the family restaurant. But is her renewed zest for life and her newfound passion for cooking linked to Jake returning home? (2021)

programme.title: All Of My Heart
programme.desc: A young caterer's life changes forever when she inherits half of a country house. With the other half belonging to a career-obsessed Wall Street trader, will they prove that opposites attract? (2015)

programme.title: Love on Safari
programme.desc: Web designer Kira of Chicago inherits a wildlife reserve in South Africa. There she meets head ranger Tom. Will she sell it and return to her accountant boyfriend Brad or...?

programme.title: Date with Love
programme.desc: Hollywood star Alex accepts a prom proposal from David an unpopular high school student, to help rebuild her profile. Alex will soon discover the Heidi has a crush on David. (2016)

programme.title: HOUSE OF SECRETS
programme.desc: A plot to flood Britain with counterfeit notes is discovered by the CIA in Paris. A suspect who resembles the gang leader, Chancellor, is arrested and is persuaded to take on his identity in order to infiltrate the gang and foil their plan.

programme.title: HUNTED
programme.desc: When six-year-old Robbie runs away he stumbles upon a man, Chris, with a dead body. Scared that Robbie will report him, he takes him. They become close as they spend time together and when Robbie becomes ill, Chris has to make a difficult decision.

programme.title: ONE JUMP AHEAD
programme.desc: Jimmy, a young schoolboy, witnesses a murder. When the body of Richard Snell is discovered a news reporter begins investigating. He discovers that Jimmy was wearing Richard¬¨√≠s hat and that the killer murdered Richard believing he witnessed the crime.

programme.title: ONE WAY OUT
programme.desc: Superintendent Harcourt is investigating the suicide of a woman who is found wearing a valuable necklace recently reported stolen. Harcourt sets about battling against, Danvers, a crook that will do anything to stay out of prison.

programme.title: THE RIDDLE OF THE SANDS
programme.desc: Two sailors become suspicious when they meet off the north coast of Germany.

programme.title: THE UPTURNED GLASS
programme.desc: Suspenseful psychological thriller about a prosperous British brain surgeon who plots to murder the woman responsible for the death of the girl he loved.

programme.title: The Grand Seduction
programme.desc: Brendan Gleeson is Murray, a once proud fisherman who now, along with his former colleagues in the harbour of Tickle Head are out of work and forced to live off welfare.

programme.title: Memoirs of a Geisha
programme.desc: A visually stunning adaptation of Arthur Golden's best-selling novel. The director of Chicago, Rob Marshall, transports us into a mysterious and exotic world that casts a potent spell. A Cinderella story like no other, MEMOIRS OF A GEISHA stars Ziyi Zhang, Ken Watanabe, Michelle Yeoh and Gong Li.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: The epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine.

programme.title: Mad Money
programme.desc: Deep inside the most secure bank in America, three desperate women from very different worlds cook up the most unlikely heist of the century.

programme.title: Elysium
programme.desc: In the year 2154, two classes of people exist: the very wealthy, who live on a pristine man-made space station called Elysium, and the rest, who live on an overpopulated, ruined Earth.

programme.title: Hard Times
programme.desc: Charles Bronson demonstrates what tough is as he plays a drifter caught up in the fight game duringthe Great Depression.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome To Raccoon City
programme.desc: Witness the beginning of Evil Raccoon City, which was once a booming home of pharmaceutical giant Umbrella Corporation, is now a dying Midwestern town. The company's exodus left the city a wasteland with great evil brewing below the surface. When that evil is unleashed, a group of survivors must work together to uncover the truth behind Umbrella and make it through the night.

programme.title: Stealth
programme.desc: Deeply ensconced in a top-secret military program, three pilots struggle to bring an artificial intelligence program under control ... before it initiates the next world war.

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Jennifer Aniston and Gerard Butler, two exes continually one-up each other until they find themselves on the run for their lives.

programme.title: Saving Silverman
programme.desc: Two friends try anything to keep their buddy and bandmate from marrying the wrong woman.

programme.title: The Wedding Ringer
programme.desc: After a barbershop manager advises his best friend to break off his engagement, he unexpectedly falls in love with the jilted fiancee, testing both his new romance and his friendship.

programme.title: Cops And Robbersons
programme.desc: Norman Robberson is a mild-mannered accountant who is addicted to TV cop shows. His dreams of playing "cops and robbers" comes to life when two cops move in to stake out the mobsters next door. When a no-nonsense cop meets the meddlesome Robberson family, his assignment becomes anything but routine!

programme.title: The Crossing
programme.desc: Based on the historical novel by Howard Fast, THE CROSSING stars Jeff Daniels as George Washington, the revolutionary war general who leads American colonialists in the war against British rule. This telefilm dramatizes Washington's crossing of the Delaware River in 1776, prior to his eventual election as the first president of the United States.

programme.title: Death Of A Salesman
programme.desc: Willy Loman is an aging, traveling salesman, who despairs that his life his been lived in vain. Facing dispensability and insignificance in a heated, youthful economy, Willy is not ready to part with his cherished fantasies of an America that admires him for personable triumphs in the marketplace.

programme.title: The Way Back
programme.desc: The Way Back is the critically acclaimed new release from renowned director Peter Weir (Master and Commander, The Truman Show), starring Colin Farrell, Jim Sturgess, Ed Harris, Mark Strong and Saoirse Ronan. Inspired by an incredible true story, this epic film of survival against-the-odds tells the story of a group of seven prisoners who escaped from a Soviet gulag in Stalin-era Russia and walked over 4,000 miles across some of the most unforgiving terrain in the world, crossing the Siberian Arctic, the Gobi desert and the Himalayas before finally arriving in British-ruled India.

programme.title: The Boy in the Plastic Bubble
programme.desc: Loving parents Johnny (Robert Reed, TV's “The Brady Bunch”) and Mickey Lubitch (Diana Hyland, TV's “Peyton Place”) learn that their son, Tod (Travolta), is born with an immune deficiency. Forced to live in a self-contained environment, he is unable to have direct contact with anything or anyone in the outside world. Despite being sheltered from society, Tod remains optimistic about life, even developing a relationship with his neighbor, Gina (Glynnis O'Connor, Johnny Dangerously). But all Tod hopes for is to get outside and experience what others take for granted.

programme.title: Born to Race
programme.desc: Born To Race is the story of Danny Krueger, a rebellious young street racer on a collision course with trouble. After an accident at an illegal street race, he is sent to a small town to live with his estranged father, a washed up NASCAR racer.

programme.title: Lost in the Pacific
programme.desc: A luxury airline is making its maiden flight, with a group of VIP passengers on board, when disaster strikes. A mechanical failure forces the plane to crash land and it ends up on a remote Pacific island where passengers and crew must wait to be rescued.

programme.title: Deadly Inferno
programme.desc: During some extensive renovations on an eight-storey office building, a major gas leak leads to a terrible explosion, trapping the injured staff in a fiery maze. Can the brave firefighters provide a safe exit from this deadly inferno?

programme.desc: The epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine.

programme.title: Mehek S1 E30
programme.desc: Zindagi Ki Mehek is an Indian television drama series that aired from 2016 to 2018. The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: Dholi Beats S1 E30
programme.desc: The story revolves around Geet, a young woman who follows her father's footsteps as a dhol player, challenging societal norms about gender roles in music. Her journey is supported by her husband, Malhar, who helps her pursue her dreams.

programme.title: King of Hearts S1 E30
programme.desc: Jamai Raja is an Indian drama series about Siddharth, who marries Roshni to mend her strained relationship with her mother, Durga Devi Patel. The show explores the complexities of family dynamics, love, and duty as Siddharth navigates various challenges to unite his new family.

programme.title: Second Chances S1 E30
programme.desc: Yash, a rich and esteemed business tycoon, yearns for real love. While he falls in love with Neha, the journey ahead is not going to be an easy one for him. Will he be able to win Nehas heart?

programme.title: Jodha Akbar S1 E30
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: This is Fate S1 E30

programme.title: The Good Son S1 E30
programme.desc: Raja Beta is an Indian television drama series that revolves around the life of Vedant Tripathi, an ideal and dutiful son. Vedant is adopted by the Tripathi family and grows up to become a successful gynecologist. Despite facing challenges and prejudice due to his adopted status, he wins the love and respect of his family through his unwavering dedication, kindness, and sense of responsibility.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Owls

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats

programme.title: Peace Parks

programme.title: Winter Journey to the Polar Circle (Exploring Norway on the Nordlandsbanen)
programme.desc: The Nordland Railway in Norway, travels from Trondheim through the isolated regions of Trendelag and Nordland. After Mo I Rana, it traverses the Arctic Circle and ends in the northern Norwegian town of Bodø. The railway covers a distance of some 729 kilometres, passing by dense, snow-covered forests, frozen fjords and snow-capped mountains. Temperatures of sometimes minus 30 degrees are quite normal here for months, on many days there is no more than five hours of daylight. Kindergarten teacher Kaia Aarstrand und her husband, Bjørnar, a technician for the municipality, live with their four boys in Aursletta, deep within the Vistenfjord, far away from civilization. All made possible by the Norwegian state: electricity, mobile phone connection and a speedboat that brings the family to school and to work. But when the Vistenfjord freezes up, the family is isolated for days. Tormod Schøning spends hours on end on his Saltfjellet whenever snowstorms occur and he has to clear the only road connection between North and South Norway with his snow plough. For the duration of his shifts, Tormod lives in the snow plough station.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: Wide open spaces, water, meadows: The Limfjord stretches through Jutland in Denmark in countless bays, canals and sounds. Mighty water castles, country palaces and magnificent monasteries are enthroned on its shores. It is a rather lonely area, even in high summer it is quiet. This is probably why the people here are so friendly and sociable. Birte, Silla and Bo cycle to their fjord garden project in the harbor of the town of Løgstør to harvest mussels, oysters and seaweed. They think gardening is best in a club. Luckily, Silla, a resourceful tinkerer, has just made another ingenious invention: the mussel washing machine. Cruising the narrow Næssund, a branch of the Limfjord, is the Næssund Ferry, the smallest and oldest car ferry in the area. New on board, and the first and only woman on this ship, is deckhand Lilian Kohler. She is "girl for everything", but wants more, because Lilian is a trained navigator. She is magically drawn to the bridge, but the old captain doesn't think much of retiring ashore.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: No city shines in summer like Saint Petersburg: the golden domes gleam by day, and during the White Nights in June, the sun does not set but conjures a mystical twilight. The magnificent buildings of the tsarist era meet a modern generation of Russians who celebrate their city and are proud of its founder, Peter the Great. The young seamstress Maria Korolenko restores original garments of the tsar in the summer palace, Peterhof. She often works for months on a single jacket, an exclusive glimpse behind the scenes of one of Europe's most magnificent treasure troves. At night, Maria is drawn to the Neva River just like thousands of residents: they dance, sing, paint or fish.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.sub-title: The white wilderness in Greenland's East
programme.desc: Fjords, glaciers and the highest mountains in the Arctic: East Greenland with its spectacular nature is one of the most sparsely populated regions on earth. The people here live in extreme isolation and depend on helicopter flights for their supplies. Despite harsh conditions, the inhabitants here lovingly maintain their traditions and enjoy their outdoor leisure time even at minus 20 degrees Celsius. The town of Tasiilaq is the "metropolis" with 4,000 inhabitants and offers a very special attraction: the only ski lift on the east coast. Thomas Mikaelsen, the lift attendant, is not to be envied for his job. The only 100 meter long lift comes from Switzerland and is already 20 years old. If Thomas gets the drag lift running at all, it often only lasts for an hour. Then the ski crazy's luck depends on his repair skills. The lift is the only frosty open-air pleasure. For Salo Kunuk his sled dogs are both pleasure and work. He is currently teaching his daughter Karla how to steer a dog sled, private driving lessons from her father, so to speak. Karla will need it, because in the eternal ice the sled is the only means of transportation.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: Fjord, ford, bay, gulf: there are many names for the beautiful extensions of the Baltic Sea into the country. Eckernförde Bay is shaped by currents, surf and people. It stretches 17 kilometers to the town that gives it its name. Stephan Möller is the acting shooting master of the Eckernförder Bürgerschützengilde. He spent a whole year preparing the beach shooting festival and then this: fog, rain and a stiff breeze. Traditionally, the Eckernförde marksmen always shoot at a wooden bird in the direction of the sea at Whitsun. Under strict conditions! And these stipulate a clear view of at least one kilometer out into the bay. The event literally threatens to fall through, for the first time in 449 years. Around 3,000 soldiers are stationed at the Eckernförde naval base, but only a small group is allowed to call itself an elite unit: the mine divers. They are considered the toughest soldiers in the Navy. Anyone who wants to be one of them has to undergo extreme training. This year, just two candidates made it to the final round. Now they still have to pass the dreaded final exam: running 20 kilometers with marching gear and then swimming ten kilometers through Eckernförde Bay.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: The Wismar Bay is unique in its diversity on the Mecklenburg Baltic Sea coast: cliffs, sandy beaches, salt marshes, enchanted islands and, last but not least, the proud Hanseatic city of Wismar with its brick Gothic buildings, which are a UNESCO World Heritage Site. When the mighty logs get wedged together in the timber mill in the port of Wismar, Steven Buchholz has to get to work with his chainsaw. It's a dangerous job, because the logs weigh tons. As a trained carpenter, Steven is a virtuoso with the chain saw. Even after his shift is over, he is looking for the thrill: the wind off his home island of Poel is favorable that day and he wants to reclaim the German record in the kite surfing high jump. For a long time, Ramona Stelzer only knew fish as a tasty ingredient between two halves of a bun. But when the goldsmith got her hands on fish leather, her business idea was born: she processes the unique natural product fish skin into fine jewelry. The problem is that hardly anyone in Germany tans fish skin. In order to reliably obtain supplies, Ramona now wants to learn this craft herself.

programme.title: In Search of Old Russia: St. Petersburg
programme.sub-title: The Enchantment of the White Nights
programme.desc: This series delves deep into this more than thousand-year-old cultural history in Europe's East. For the very first time, sensational footage, shot by the world's best cameramen, presents a bird's-eye view of the most important and most beautiful buildings of Old Russia. The camera explores en detail art and ornamentation, mounted on high on these splendid structures centuries ago to the glory of God, far above the line of vision of humans. Authors familiar with Russian culture find the material for their stories beneath the roofs and golden onion-shaped towers, which tell of old traditions, passions and visions. Russian and Ukrainian protagonists fill the stories, which encompass this unique culture and architecture, time and again with their warmth, their love and a good portion of humor. They proudly present the old Russian legacy that during the World War and in the old Soviet Union days, constantly threatened to disappear.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Most of the year it's encased in ice but when summer hits, Anchorage bursts into life. Animals and plants living this far north have been forced to adapt, but the wildlife built to withstand Alaskan winters, often struggle in the summer heat!

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Alaska is one of the last true wildernesses on earth. But in Anchorage you don't have to head into to the wild to discover the wildlife. With a city that has so much green space, it means everywhere is fair game for its wild neighbours.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: With so many animals living in the city, sometimes they get themselves into trouble. But help is never far away. In Anchorage the wildlife come first, with lots of organisations and people that are working hard to protect them.

programme.title: The Animal Communicator
programme.desc: Anna Breytenbach has dedicated her life to what she calls interspecies communication. She sends detailed messages to animals through pictures and thoughts. She then receives messages of remarkable clarity back from the animals.

programme.title: Wild Animal Rescue
programme.sub-title: Closing the Worst Zoo In The World
programme.desc: Animals at a struggling zoo in Gaza are in desperate need of aid. Left devastated by war, Khan Younis Zoo was dubbed the ‘worst zoo in the world.' In 2014 Khan Younis Zoo boasted 44 animals now only 15 remain. FOUR PAWS must rapidly swing into action

programme.title: The Great Penguin Rescue
programme.desc: Michaela rescues two cuddly little penguin chicks, but will she be able to care for them well enough to keep them alive through their critical first two weeks?

programme.title: The Great Penguin Rescue
programme.desc: As more starving penguin chicks are rescued, Michaela must work as hard as she can to keep the youngsters alive, but can she keep up with the pace as the birds keep on coming?

programme.title: The Great Penguin Rescue
programme.desc: Michael needs to face her fears now and learn the critical task of hand feeding young birds. If she doesn't, they will certainly die. But can she master the task in time?

programme.title: The Great Penguin Rescue
programme.desc: It's the end of her time at the rescue mission, now she must successfully release her favourite birds back into the sea. Have they learnt enough to survive in the wild? Michaela certainly hopes so.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Anchorage is home over 2000 moose! And these notorious animals are running riot. Crossing busy highways, giving birth in backyards, and even doing battle in suburbia! But life on the streets is fraught with danger in this expanding city.

programme.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 1
programme.desc: Welcome to the 2023 Strongman Champions League in Vaasa, Finland! This year's event introduces a knockout format with 6 intense events over 90 minutes, ending in a unique deadlift face-off with boats.

programme.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 2
programme.desc: Stage 2 of the Strongman Champions League 2023 is set in Zrenjanin, Serbia. This exciting event features 5 challenging contests, including a superhuman Yoke race. As the SCL World Series Tour continues, athletes will battle it out to claim the yellow leader's position for the season. Don't miss this incredible stage of strength and endurance!

programme.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 3
programme.desc: The World's Strongest Team will be crowned in this edition of SCL, here in Kalajoki-Finland we've picked some of the best in the business, teamed them up, and they'll be going all out against each other. It's now no longer about being a lonely wolf, but more about the pack mentality. It is a competition over 7 events, including a Big 2-man Log lift and heavy deadlift. Let's start the action.

programme.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 4
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League in Holland at the Dru Factory in ULFT. A great location for a spectacular battle with 14 Athletes over 3 events! The first 3 events in this episode are Truckpull/ Superyoke and Farmerswalk, with 2 massive logs of 150 kg in their hands. So, join us for the show of strength, the place of power, it's the circus of the extreme.

programme.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 5
programme.desc: Ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, strongman fans across the world, we are back for SCL Holland part two. Get ready because it's about to get heavy. The Strongman Champions League in Holland, continues with the last 3 events, here at the Dru Factory in ULFT. The events in this episode are the Viking Press, Wheel Flip and the Atlas Stones, with 180 kg in the end.

programme.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 6
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the World's Strongest Latino competition has begun. This two-day event in Porto, Portugal, features 20 athletes from around the world competing in 8 events. After 4 grueling events, the top 12 will advance to the finals.

programme.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 7
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League World Record Breakers 2023 starts with a 25-ton snow plow! Crazy machines are pulled and pushed, with many kilograms moved. A few new world records are set in this competition.

programme.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 8
programme.desc: We have returned to the powerhouse of Portugal for an edge-of-your-seat galactic battle. If all the planets collided at once, it wouldn't compare to the bang of this show. Get ready for the battle of the beasts it's the heaviest show in the universe, the Strongman Champions League.
